about.title: Hello, I'm Brent
about.description1: Hello! I'm a Belgian full-stack developer passionate about building reliable systems. I've been learning since 2019 and constantly improving my skills.
about.description2: My goal is not just to build reliable systems but also to develop systems that people like using without necessary complexity.
about.techDescription: I work across the full stack using modern technologies including React, Angular, Next.js, TypeScript, Node.js, NestJS, React Native, Python, .NET, C#, MySQL, and Docker

work.title: IT Developer & Administrator
work.description: Maintained real systems, client collaboration, performance optimization.

work.title: Full-Stack Developer
work.description: Built full-stack applications, code reviews, team collaboration.
work.personalNote: Learned the value of code reviews and team collaboration.

education.title: Developer Intern
education.description: Two weeks building React Native components. Mobile development, component architecture.
education.personalNote: Intensive learning experience in mobile development.

hackathons.title: Hack The Future
hackathons.description: Solo again. 5th place. Building under pressure = fast learning.

hackathons.title: Hack The Future - Among The Stars
hackathons.description: Last place. Learned more from failure than wins.

hackathons.title: Hack The Future - Jungle Expedition
hackathons.description: First hackathon, solo with Angular. 4th place. Overwhelmed but worked.
hackathons.personalNote: First hackathon experience. Challenging but rewarding.

webDevelopment.title: Web Development
webDevelopment.description: Websites that just work. High-performance sites built for real users. No bloat, just a fast, seamless experience for your users.

fullStackApps.title: Full-Stack Apps
fullStackApps.description: From Idea to Interface. I build end-to-end applications where the front and back ends talk to each other perfectly, so you don't have to worry about the 'how'.

deployment.title: Deployment & Hosting
deployment.description: Go live with confidence. I handle the heavy lifting—Docker, Linux, and Cloud—to make sure your app stays online, secure, and ready for traffic.

database.title: Database Design
database.description: Data you can actually use. I structure your information so it's organized for today and ready to scale for tomorrow. Simple, logical, and future-proof.

architecture.title: Architecture Planning
architecture.description: Measure twice, code once. I will map out the 'big picture' together, ensuring every piece of tech aligns with your goals before a single line of code is written.

projects.title: Things I've built
projects.subtitle: Real projects for real clients. Each one taught me something new.

items.title: Carrosserie Kris
items.description: A local body shop website that I've been iterating on since 2021.
items.longDescription: Ongoing project since 2021. Continuous improvements to performance, SEO, and user experience. Long-term client relationship with regular updates and maintenance.

items.title: Provilion Broodjes
items.description: School lunch ordering system with payment processing.
items.longDescription: Complete sandwich ordering platform for a school. Students order, parents manage credits, administrators handle operations. Integrated Stripe payments and custom admin dashboard. Payment flows and role-based permissions.

items.title: Het Smaakpand (Closed)
items.description: Simple website for a sandwich shop that has since closed.
items.longDescription: Simple website for a local sandwich shop. Clean design, menu display, mobile-responsive. Focused on simplicity and functionality.

security.title: Security
security.subtitle: Security isn't an afterthought—it's built in from the start.
security.description: I focus on secure coding practices, proper authentication, and keeping data safe. Every project includes security considerations from day one.

contact.title: Let's work together
contact.subtitle: Have a project in mind? Let's talk.

output.about:
Brent Schoenmakers
Full-Stack Developer & Aspiring Cybersecurity Engineer

I'm a developer from Geel, Belgium who's been building for the web since 2019.
Currently focusing on full-stack development with React, Node.js, and modern tools,
while also pursuing cybersecurity engineering.

Passionate about building secure, efficient applications and learning about
security best practices.

output.secret:
[SECRET REVEALED]

You found it! Here's a secret:

I started my journey at just 11 years old. I kept learning, failing, and starting again, which evolved into a hobby, a job, and most importantly, a passion.
So remember, if you are just starting out or don't know how to continue: you can achieve anything with the right motivation. Search for tutorials, articles, or anything that can help you evolve your journey to eventually build amazing solutions.
Conclusion in 3 words: Keep pushing forward!

Keep exploring - there's more to discover!
